overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a retro-futuristic diner from Cyberpunk 2077. The player character stands up from a booth and walks down the central aisle past other patrons seated at tables and the bar, moving toward the kitchen area at the back. The environment features classic 1950s diner aesthetics with teal counters, red bar stools, checkered floors, and prominent neon signage.

events.description: character stands up from the booth seat and begins walking
passing close by a patron in a plaid shirt, temporarily blocking the left side of view

agents.ego_description: sitting in a diner booth examining magazines on the table, then standing up and moving forward past adjacent seating

notable_agents.action: man in yellow plaid shirt sitting in the adjacent booth, looking down at his table

entered.detail: large circular red neon sign with white cursive lettering mounted on the back wall
red Formica-topped dining table with metal edges
stack of glossy magazines with colorful covers featuring vehicles and advertisements
purple dome-shaped table lamp with metallic base
black and white checkered tile flooring extending throughout the diner
long curved teal-colored service counter with metallic trim
red upholstered bar stools with chrome bases lined along the counter

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a seated view in a retro diner booth, showing magazines on a red table and a purple lamp. The character stands up and begins walking, passing a man in a yellow plaid shirt sitting in the adjacent booth. The iconic 'Tom's Diner' neon sign is visible in the background, with the teal counter and checkered floor establishing the classic diner aesthetic.

scene_state.functional_zone: central aisle between booths and service counter

events.description: passing by a woman eating at a booth on the left side
moving into brighter overhead fluorescent lighting as the camera advances down the aisle

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the central aisle between the booth seating and the service counter

notable_agents.action: woman in white tank top eating noodles with chopsticks from a plate on the table

entered.detail: metal napkin dispenser sitting on the dining table
salt and pepper shakers and condiment bottles on the table
flat screen television mounted on the far wall of the diner

segments.scene_description: The camera moves down the central aisle of the diner, passing a woman in a white tank top eating at a booth on the left. The checkered floor pattern becomes more prominent as the perspective shifts. The neon sign moves to the left side of the frame while the teal counter and red stools remain visible along the left. Overhead fluorescent lighting becomes brighter as the camera advances toward the back of the establishment.

scene_state.functional_zone: diner walkway approaching kitchen service area

events.description: passing directly under bright overhead light fixtures creating strong illumination
approaching the kitchen service counter and pass-through window at the back of the diner

agents.ego_description: continuing down the aisle toward the back of the diner, passing empty booth seating on the right

entered.detail: rotating ceiling fan with integrated lighting fixtures
service counter and kitchen pass-through window at the back of the diner
vintage-style jukebox with illuminated display standing against the right wall

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera advancing down the remaining length of the diner aisle toward the kitchen area. The 'Tom's Diner' neon sign is now prominent on the left side, much closer than before. A jukebox becomes visible on the right wall. The camera passes under bright ceiling lights and approaches the service counter at the back, where the kitchen pass-through window is visible. The checkered floor leads the eye toward the back of the establishment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a seated position in a cozy booth through the central aisle of a retro-futuristic diner toward the kitchen. It begins at a red table with magazines and a purple lamp, moving forward as the character stands and passes a man in a yellow plaid shirt. As the camera advances down the checkered floor, the perspective shifts past a woman in a white tank top while the teal counter and red stools slide along the left side of the frame. The scene then opens up under brightening overhead fluorescent lights, bringing the Tom's Diner neon sign into closer view on the left and revealing a jukebox on the right wall. Finally, the camera glides past the remaining seating area to approach the service counter and the kitchen pass-through window at the back of the establishment.
